docs.title: Welcome to the Knowledge Atlas
docs.text:
Select a textbook below to begin your journey.

  • :octicons-beaker-24: Biology --- Explore the science of life, from cells to ecosystems. :octicons-arrow-right-24: Start Reading

  • :octicons-rocket-24: Physics --- Master the laws of the universe, motion, and energy. :octicons-arrow-right-24: Start Reading

  • :octicons-people-24: The Team --- Learn more about the educators behind these resources. :octicons-arrow-right-24: Meet Us
